It's important to note that capturing passwords or other sensitive information using tools like Wireshark can be illegal and unethical unless you have explicit permission from all parties involved, especially if the data is being transmitted over networks you don't control. This type of activity should only be performed in environments where you are authorized to do so.

That said, here’s an outline on how to set up Wireshark for packet capture:
